creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Doesn't appear to be an mbuf issue.  Running the two scripts below simultaneously:

#!/bin/sh -e

cd AD-VCFs-whi/MAF-0.01-1000nt
while true; do
    ls | grep 'combined.*\.vcf\.xz' | wc -l
    sleep 2
done

   11035
   11033
   11031
   11031
   11027
   11030
   11031
   11031
   11038
   11031
   11032

#!/bin/sh -e

while true; do
    vmstat -z | egrep 'ITEM|mbuf_cluster'
    sleep 1
done
